Question: Which of the following statements is/are correct?
Statement1: The average kinetic energy of molecules in a body reaches the minimum value when the body is at $0 \degree $C.
Statement2: If two bodies are at the same temperature, the molecules in the two bodies will have the same average kinetic energy.
